reply_handling_if_spontaneous_reply_arri.if_not_interested: Classify NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel. Log CHANGELOG.
reply_handling_if_spontaneous_reply_arri.if_unsubscribe: Classify UNSUBSCRIBE. Cancel Day-14. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
reply_handling_if_spontaneous_reply_arri.if_ooo: Classify OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Return MUST be before 2026-05-25 to receive Day-14. If return after 2026-05-25: mark sequence complete — 4-touchpoint hard limit.
reply_handling_if_spontaneous_reply_arri.if_wrong_person: Classify WRONG_PERSON. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
